overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. The player character moves from a narrow construction alley through bustling commercial streets filled with holographic advertisements, eventually crossing a vibrant intersection before continuing down an urban thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with construction material storage

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alleyway past stacked cardboard bales and construction debris

entered.detail: tall green metal corrugated wall running along the left side of the alley
large bundles of compressed cardboard stacked on pallets
plastic garbage bags piled near the fence
concrete wall with graffiti and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed alleyway with wet concrete underfoot. Green corrugated metal fencing lines the left side alongside stacked cardboard bales and trash bags. The atmosphere is dimly lit and sheltered from the rain, with distant neon lights visible at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with damaged vehicle and digital advertising

events.description: passing wrecked abandoned car on the left sidewalk
large digital billboard reading 'TOUGH MORNINGS?' becomes prominent on right

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk next to light traffic, observing neon-lit buildings and billboards

entered.detail: damaged and rusted vehicle parked on the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement for Mayapac Coffee with bold text
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from building
raised highway or monorail track running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley onto a wider urban street, the scene opens up to reveal light traffic and towering neon-lit buildings. The camera passes a wrecked car on the left while a massive digital billboard advertising coffee dominates the right side of the frame. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights from surrounding skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved commercial street with elevated walkways and dense neon signage

events.description: approaching outdoor staircase and elevated pedestrian walkway on right

agents.ego_description: walking along curved street with neon-lit buildings on both sides, approaching a pedestrian overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: raised concrete walkway with railings connecting buildings
staircase leading up to the elevated walkway
tall narrow digital advertisement screen on building facade
illuminated hotel sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The path curves through a dense commercial district with an elevated pedestrian walkway visible on the right. Neon signs in various colors illuminate the wet street, and a tall vertical billboard towers ahead. The architecture features a mix of modern glass and industrial concrete with holographic advertisements visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with multi-directional neon signage and crosswalks

events.description: stepping onto crosswalk and beginning to cross the intersection
turning head to survey the intersection while continuing to cross

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while observing vibrant neon signs and navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street from left to right
figure standing near building entrance observing the street

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt
wall with colorful spray paint and murals
tall pole with traffic signals and lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection filled with pedestrians crossing in various directions. Bright neon signs in red, blue, and purple illuminate the area, including a prominent hotel sign. The camera navigates the crosswalk while turning to take in the surrounding cyberpunk architecture and dense commercial signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street continuing away from intersection with building facades

events.description: exiting intersection and continuing down straight urban street

agents.ego_description: walking down the street away from the intersection, passing neon-lit storefronts and building entrances

entered.detail: road extending into the distance with neon lights
large glowing circular structure visible down the street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds down a straight urban street lined with multi-story buildings featuring neon signage. The density of pedestrians decreases, and the focus shifts to the architectural details of the cyberpunk cityscape with distant illuminated structures visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, dim alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within a narrow passage of wet concrete and green corrugated fencing, moving past stacked trash toward a distant glow of light. As the camera emerges from the alley, the environment opens into a wide urban street where the dimness is replaced by towering skyscrapers and a massive digital coffee billboard reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement. The path then curves through a dense commercial district under elevated walkways and holographic advertisements before expanding further into a vibrant, crowded intersection illuminated by red and purple hotel signs. Finally, the camera navigates through the pedestrian crosswalk and proceeds down a straight urban thoroughfare, where the crowd thins and the focus shifts toward the distant, illuminated architecture of the cityscape.
